{{Infobox group
| name = Luminian
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Luminian Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Luminian Order]] is a disciplined and organized religious and paramilitary organization founded by [[Loreli]], the Daughter of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. The group is centered around the worship of an [[Unknown God]] and follows a credo that emphasizes righteousness, healing, and the eradication of [[Elders]]. Their headquarters is located at [[Hightower]], a fortified complex near the [[Capital]] that features a massive cathedral and a prominent stone tower topped with a large, glowing glass orb. This headquarters is noted for its [[aura]] of peace and tranquility, which has been cultivated over centuries. [[The Order]] is composed of several distinct roles. [[Pilgrims]] are recognizable by their all-white clothing and silver medallions bearing the [[White Sun]] crest; they serve as healers and religious figures. To become a full [[Soulbound]] [[Pilgrim]], members must undergo years of service, oppose various [[Elders]], and master both [[alchemy]] and medical skills. [[The Order]] also maintains [[Luminian Knights]], who wear silver armor and provide security and military support. The organization is led by a Head, such as [[Jameson Allbright]], and has historically been involved in both warfare and peacekeeping efforts. Historically, the Luminians have transitioned from leading humanity into war to preaching peace. While they are allies to the [[Independent Guilds]], providing auxiliary security and medical aid, they have also faced internal challenges, such as the loss of members during [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s death. Their influence is widespread, and they are known for their strict regulations and ability to provide specialized support in times of crisis.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Luminians believed [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] lived on due to his virtue and will.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The chapter house resembles a [[Luminian cathedral]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Luminian]] [[Pilgrims]] rushed forward to heal [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Luminians exterminated the last of the [[Dead Mother]]’s cults almost two hundred years ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Luminians refuse to heal a man's son.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Luminians are part of the Independent alliance.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Luminians are proud, strong, and easy to provoke due to their code.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[White Sun]] belongs to the Luminians.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Luminians are a group that lost their connection to others on the night of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s death, an event linked to significant assassination ramifications. While members of the [[Magister]]'s [[Guild]] were once part of this group, Maxeus's assassins were trained following the Luminians' loss of their own. Known for using polite and official language, the group maintains Luminian [[Pilgrims]] within the palace who are currently engaged in cleansing the [[Capital]] of [[Elderspawn]]. Although they treated [[Benji]] and his companions well, they were not viewed as a family, and the group's devotion is seen in their assassins. During certain gatherings, some Luminians kneel while others, including [[Shera]] and a few confused members, remain standing.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Luminians lost 'the others' on the night [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] died.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Luminians are a group mentioned in the context of assassination ramifications.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Luminians are a group that [[Shera]] can send messengers to in emergencies.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Magister]]'s [[Guild]] assassins were once part of the Luminians.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxeus's assassins were trained after the Luminians lost them.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Luminian]] words are described as polite and official.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|There are [[Luminian]] [[Pilgrims]] in the palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Luminians are cleansing the [[Capital]] of [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Luminian]] [[Pilgrims]] can be stung by bees.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Luminians treated [[Benji]] and the others right but were not considered a family.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The assassin is described as a devout [[Luminian]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] and a handful of confused Luminians were standing while others knelt.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Headquartered in [[Rainworth]], the Luminians are an established order that dedicates itself to the study of the [[Elders]]. This group maintains a watchful presence as guards of the [[Rose Tower]] and possesses knowledge regarding the crown. Their specialized [[Pilgrims]] are renowned experts highly recommended for their unique healing abilities. These medical talents become critically important when a Luminian is required to treat [[Calder]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Luminians study [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Luminians know about the crown.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Luminians guard the [[Rose Tower]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Luminian]] [[Pilgrims]] are experts recommended for their healing powers.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Luminians are an order with headquarters in [[Rainworth]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Luminian]] is needed to heal [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Composed of silver-armored knights and white-clad [[Pilgrims]], the Luminians are a group that worships the [[Unknown God]]. While they acknowledge that the [[Great Elders]] might fear unity within their [[Guild]], the [[Pilgrims]] have historically worked to copy the first [[Beacon]]. During recent conflicts, the group clustered behind a barrier and hurried toward an exit following [[Jorin]], though one lone member was eventually captured for [[Calder]]'s panel. The Luminians have since fought alongside [[Blackwatch]], and [[Loreli]] spent time in their company.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Luminians agree that the [[Great Elders]] may fear [[Guild]] unity.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Luminians consist of white-clad [[Pilgrims]] and silver-armored knights.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Luminians are a group clustering behind a barrier.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Luminians are a group that hurried behind [[Jorin]] toward an exit.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A lone [[Luminian]] was captured and included in [[Calder]]'s panel.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Luminians worship the [[Unknown God]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Luminian]] [[Pilgrims]] copied the first [[Beacon]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Luminians are fighting side-by-side with [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] spent her time with the Luminians.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“The Luminians, they won’t heal my son—”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
